name: observability-assets
description: Prometheus and Grafana plugin with practical skills for alert-rule design, recording-rule support, promtool validation, dashboard JSON authoring, and Grafana mixin workflows for version-controlled observability assets.
author: ririnto

interface.shortDescription: Practical Prometheus alerting, recording rules, promtool, Grafana dashboard, and mixin workflows.
interface.longDescription: Install a shared Prometheus and Grafana plugin with example-driven skills for Prometheus alert-rule design, promtool validation, recording-rule support, Grafana dashboard JSON authoring, and Grafana mixin and Jsonnet workflows for Git-managed observability assets.
defaultPrompt: Draft a Prometheus alert rule for this symptom and validate it with promtool.
Show me the Grafana dashboard JSON or mixin shape for this signal.
Review this Prometheus or Grafana asset for noise, drift, or source-of-truth issues.
